question: top 5 products by total quantity sold
golden_sql: SELECT p.Name, p.Brand, SUM(oi.Quantity) AS total_qty FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.ProductId, p.Name, p.Brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: revenue by sub-category
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId WHERE sc.ParentCategoryId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: average order value for customers aged over 40
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(o.TotalAmount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Age > 40

question: top 10 products by number of reviews
golden_sql: SELECT p.Name, p.Brand, COUNT(*) AS review_cnt FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.ProductId, p.Name, p.Brand ORDER BY review_cnt DESC LIMIT 10

question: brands with highest return rate
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN o.Status = 'Returned' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS return_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY return_rate DESC

question: revenue from express shipping orders by brand
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.ShippingMethod = 'Express' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: average product rating by brand for orders placed by VIP customers
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, ROUND(AVG(r.Rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN OrderItem oi ON p.ProductId = oi.ProductId JOIN Order_ o ON oi.OrderId = o.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Segment = 'VIP' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: top 5 states by total spend from VIP customers
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Province AS state, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS total_spend FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Segment = 'VIP' GROUP BY cu.Province ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

question: most reviewed sub-category
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, COUNT(*) AS review_cnt FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId WHERE sc.ParentCategoryId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY review_cnt DESC LIMIT 1

question: top 5 brands with the most cancelled orders
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, COUNT(*) AS cancelled_cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId WHERE o.Status = 'Cancelled' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY cancelled_cnt DESC LIMIT 5

question: average delivery days for high priority orders by shipping method
golden_sql: SELECT oe.ShippingMethod, ROUND(AVG(oe.DeliveryDays), 2) AS avg_days FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE o.Priority = 'High' GROUP BY oe.ShippingMethod ORDER BY avg_days ASC

question: revenue from coupon users by customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE oe.CouponUsed = 1 GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top 5 products by quantity sold to customers in California
golden_sql: SELECT p.Name, p.Brand, SUM(oi.Quantity) AS total_qty FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Order_ o ON oi.OrderId = o.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Province = 'California' GROUP BY p.ProductId, p.Name, p.Brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: average fraud risk score by customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, ROUND(AVG(oe.FraudRiskScore), 4) AS avg_fraud_risk FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY avg_fraud_risk DESC

question: on-time delivery rate by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oe.DeliveryStatus = 'On Time' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS on_time_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC

question: average order value by customer age group
golden_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN cu.Age < 30 THEN 'Under 30' WHEN cu.Age < 45 THEN '30-44' WHEN cu.Age < 60 THEN '45-59' ELSE '60+' END AS age_group, ROUND(AVG(o.TotalAmount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

question: brand revenue for weekend orders
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId WHERE o.IsWeekend = 1 GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: return rate by customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN o.Status = 'Returned' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS return_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY return_rate DESC

question: revenue by campaign source and customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT oe.CampaignSource, cu.Segment, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY oe.CampaignSource, cu.Segment ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top 5 brands by revenue for standard shipping orders
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.ShippingMethod = 'Standard' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: average product price by sub-category
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, ROUND(AVG(p.Price), 2) AS avg_price FROM Product p JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId WHERE sc.ParentCategoryId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY avg_price DESC

question: total revenue from mobile device orders by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.DeviceType = 'Mobile' GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: delayed order count by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, COUNT(*) AS delayed_cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.DeliveryStatus = 'Delayed' GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY delayed_cnt DESC

question: average loyalty score of customers who bought Nike products
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cu.LoyaltyScore), 2) AS avg_loyalty FROM Customer cu JOIN Order_ o ON cu.CustomerId = o.CustomerId JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId WHERE p.Brand = 'Nike'

question: total shipping cost by customer segment
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Segment, ROUND(SUM(oe.ShippingCostUSD), 2) AS total_shipping_cost FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY cu.Segment ORDER BY total_shipping_cost DESC

question: top 5 sub-categories by average review rating
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, ROUND(AVG(r.Rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId WHERE sc.ParentCategoryId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY avg_rating DESC LIMIT 5

question: revenue from high priority orders by payment method
golden_sql: SELECT oe.PaymentMethod, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE o.Priority = 'High' GROUP BY oe.PaymentMethod ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: average quantity per order by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, ROUND(AVG(oi.Quantity), 2) AS avg_qty FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY avg_qty DESC

question: top 10 brands by average order value
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, ROUND(AVG(o.TotalAmount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC LIMIT 10

question: revenue by product category for VIP customers
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Segment = 'VIP' GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top 5 states by revenue from express shipping orders
golden_sql: SELECT cu.Province AS state, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE oe.ShippingMethod = 'Express' GROUP BY cu.Province ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: product categories with the most returned orders
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, COUNT(*) AS return_cnt FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId WHERE o.Status = 'Returned' GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY return_cnt DESC

question: average fraud risk score by customer age group
golden_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN cu.Age < 30 THEN 'Under 30' WHEN cu.Age < 45 THEN '30-44' WHEN cu.Age < 60 THEN '45-59' ELSE '60+' END AS age_group, ROUND(AVG(oe.FraudRiskScore), 4) AS avg_fraud_risk FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY avg_fraud_risk DESC

question: coupon usage rate by product category
golden_sql: SELECT pc.Name AS category, ROUND(SUM(oe.CouponUsed) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS coupon_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY pc.Name ORDER BY coupon_rate DESC

question: top 5 brands by revenue in Q1 2025
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId WHERE o.OrderDate >= '2025-01-01' AND o.OrderDate < '2025-04-01' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: average review rating for products ordered via mobile devices
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, ROUND(AVG(r.Rating), 2) AS avg_rating FROM Review r JOIN Product p ON r.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN OrderItem oi ON p.ProductId = oi.ProductId JOIN Order_ o ON oi.OrderId = o.OrderId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE oe.DeviceType = 'Mobile' GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: top 10 brands by on-time delivery rate
golden_sql: SELECT p.Brand, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN oe.DeliveryStatus = 'On Time' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS on_time_rate FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId GROUP BY p.Brand ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC LIMIT 10

question: average delivery days for electronics orders
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(oe.DeliveryDays), 2) AS avg_delivery_days FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Category pc ON sc.ParentCategoryId = pc.CategoryId JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId WHERE pc.Name = 'Electronics'

question: revenue by warehouse location for VIP customers
golden_sql: SELECT oe.WarehouseLocation, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderExtra oe ON o.OrderId = oe.OrderId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.Segment = 'VIP' GROUP BY oe.WarehouseLocation ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top 5 sub-categories by revenue from high loyalty customers
golden_sql: SELECT sc.Name AS sub_category, SUM(o.TotalAmount) AS revenue FROM Order_ o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.OrderId = oi.OrderId JOIN Product p ON oi.ProductId = p.ProductId JOIN Category sc ON p.CategoryId = sc.CategoryId JOIN Customer cu ON o.CustomerId = cu.CustomerId WHERE cu.LoyaltyScore >= 80 GROUP BY sc.Name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5
